https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/10/two-wins-two-losses-what-india-pakistan-have-learned-a-year-after-war (anniversary retrospective, used only for events dated within cluster window). Date approximations per rule 4: Iran mediation offer (Apr 25) and Simla Agreement threat (Apr 28) pegged to first dated reporting; Munir promotion (May 21), Chauhan Singapore admission (Jun 1), and Pakistan defence budget hike (Jun 10) use the publication date of the AJ piece reporting them. Source disagreements: Pakistan and India dispute most casualty/loss figures; AJ reports Pakistani claims (5 Indian jets downed, 31 Pakistani civilians killed) which Indian officials initially denied — India only admitted aircraft losses in June at Shangri-La; ceasefire credit also disputed (AJ records both Trump and India's bilateral framing). Entries report what was stated on that date.

Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across CNN's Operation Sindoor coverage (per user instruction). Contributing articles: https://edition.cnn.com/2025/04/24/india/pahalgam-india-pakistan-attack-explainer-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/04/26/asia/india-family-friends-shattered-tourist-massacre-kashmir-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/04/29/asia/kashmir-pakistan-india-tension-military-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/02/asia/india-pakistan-kashmir-tensions-vance-rubio-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/07/asia/operation-sindoor-india-pakistan-attack-wwk-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/world/live-news/india-pakistan-operation-sindoor-05-10-25 ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/08/world/video/india-pakistan-shehbaz-sharif-kashmir-strikes-digvid ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/10/asia/india-pakistan-ceasefire-explainer-latam-intl ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/12/asia/india-pakistan-kashmir-ceasefire-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/12/asia/india-pakistan-us-ceasefire-no-winners-intl-hnk . Date approximations per rule 4: India's navy missile test pegged to Apr 27 (CNN said 'two days earlier' than Tuesday Apr 29); Rubio's calls to Indian and Pakistani leaders pegged to Apr 30 (Wednesday in CNN's account). India airspace closure dated Apr 29 (CNN May 2 piece references 'Tuesday', the Tuesday preceding the Fri May 2 publication). Source disagreements: India denied any aircraft losses on May 7; CNN reported that French intelligence confirmed at least one Indian Rafale was downed, and that two Indian planes crashed near Pakistan around the time of Pakistan's claims — recorded per rule as Pakistan's same-day claim, with India's denial in the May 12 'no winners' entry. US role in ceasefire disputed (Trump/Rubio claim brokering; India says bilateral) — captured as it was reported on May 10.
